category_sources: Official E usage/download pages describe E as a theorem prover.
source_facts.description says it is a theorem prover for full first-order logic with equality.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README describes the E equational theorem prover.
Official download page uses the release name E 3.2.
docs_sources: Official Usage and Hints page links the README, man pages, and manual as documentation.
Official download page links the draft manual for the current E release.
repo_sources: Official GitHub README points back to eprover.org as the E homepage.
Official download page gives git clone https://github.com/eprover/eprover.git for the public GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official E usage page documents command-line eprover usage and theorem-proving workflows.
source_facts.description identifies first-order logic theorem proving with equality.
